Outcome Timeframe: Density of immature stages of vectors in aquatic habitats (Quasi- experimental studies)
Study results and measurements: Based on data from participants in 12 studies. (Observational (non- randomized))
Certainty of the evidence (Quality of ev: Very low Due to serious inconsistency 1
Summary: The evidence is very uncertain about the effect of larvivorous fish on the density of immature anopheline mosquitoes in water bodies compared to no fish.

Outcome Timeframe: Larval sites positive for immature stages of the vectors (Quasi- experimental studies)
Study results and measurements: Based on data from participants in 5 studies. (Observational (non- randomized))
Certainty of the evidence (Quality of ev: Low Downgraded by two: the included studies were non - randomized controlled trials
